GEO_REST.label: Georgian Restaurant
GEO_REST.description: Full-service restaurant specializing in Georgian cuisine
GEO_REST.cheese_application: Khachapuri (all types), sulguni dishes, cheese platters, salads with fresh cheese

GEO_BAKERY.label: Georgian Bakery
GEO_BAKERY.description: Bakery specializing in khachapuri and Georgian bread products
GEO_BAKERY.cheese_application: High-volume daily khachapuri production (imeruli, adjaruli, megruli), lobiani, kubdari

GEO_MARKET.label: Georgian Specialty Market
GEO_MARKET.description: Retail store specializing in Georgian and Caucasian food products
GEO_MARKET.cheese_application: Retail cheese wheels, shredded packs, nadughi, butter for direct consumer sale

CAUC_REST.label: Caucasian/Eurasian Restaurant
CAUC_REST.description: Restaurant serving Caucasian, Armenian, or mixed Eurasian cuisine with Georgian dishes on menu
CAUC_REST.cheese_application: Khachapuri as menu item, cheese-based appetizers, Caucasian cheese platters

RUS_REST.label: Russian/Slavic Restaurant
RUS_REST.description: Restaurant serving Russian, Ukrainian, or Slavic cuisine — many include Georgian dishes
RUS_REST.cheese_application: Khachapuri as popular cross-over item, cheese-filled pastries, cheese boards

UZB_REST.label: Uzbek/Central Asian Restaurant
UZB_REST.description: Restaurant serving Uzbek, Kazakh, or Central Asian cuisine — often includes khachapuri
UZB_REST.cheese_application: Khachapuri (popular cross-menu item), cheese-filled breads, samsa variations

ARM_REST.label: Armenian Restaurant
ARM_REST.description: Armenian restaurant — cultural overlap with Georgian cheese traditions
ARM_REST.cheese_application: String cheese alternatives, cheese-filled pastries, mezze platters

EE_MARKET.label: Eastern European / Russian Grocery
EE_MARKET.description: Retail grocery store serving Eastern European, Russian, or Central Asian community
EE_MARKET.cheese_application: Retail cheese sales to diaspora community familiar with sulguni and similar cheeses

CA_MARKET.label: Central Asian Grocery / Market
CA_MARKET.description: Retail grocery serving Central Asian community — overlapping cheese culture
CA_MARKET.cheese_application: Retail cheese sales, sulguni/imeruli recognized by customers

DISTRIBUTOR.label: Specialty Food / Cheese Distributor
DISTRIBUTOR.description: Wholesale distributor serving restaurants and retail with specialty European/artisan foods
DISTRIBUTOR.cheese_application: Wholesale channel — one deal gives access to hundreds of end accounts

ARTISAN_PIZZA.label: Artisan / Neapolitan Pizzeria
ARTISAN_PIZZA.description: High-end pizza restaurant using specialty/imported cheeses
ARTISAN_PIZZA.cheese_application: Sulguni as premium melting cheese for specialty pizzas, white pies, cheese boards

INTL_MARKET.label: International / Gourmet Food Market
INTL_MARKET.description: Upscale or international grocery carrying diverse specialty foods
INTL_MARKET.cheese_application: Premium retail positioning alongside artisan European cheeses

CHEESE_SHOP.label: Artisan Cheese Shop / Monger
CHEESE_SHOP.description: Specialty cheese retailer — curates unique domestic and imported cheeses
CHEESE_SHOP.cheese_application: Positioning as unique American-made Georgian cheese — storytelling sells here

MEDITERRANEAN_REST.label: Mediterranean / Turkish Restaurant
MEDITERRANEAN_REST.description: Mediterranean or Turkish restaurant — sulguni is analogous to halloumi and beyaz peynir
MEDITERRANEAN_REST.cheese_application: Sulguni as halloumi alternative (grills similarly), fresh cheese in salads and wraps

BRUNCH_UPSCALE.label: Upscale Brunch / Farm-to-Table
BRUNCH_UPSCALE.description: Trendy brunch or farm-to-table restaurant — values artisan and local sourcing
BRUNCH_UPSCALE.cheese_application: Cheese boats as premium brunch item, nadughi as ricotta alternative, cheese boards

CATERING.label: Catering Company
CATERING.description: Event catering company — Georgian cheese as differentiated menu offering
CATERING.cheese_application: Cheese boats for catering events, cheese platters, unique appetizer offerings

MEAL_KIT.label: Meal Kit / Food Subscription
MEAL_KIT.description: Meal kit company — could feature khachapuri kit with Colchis cheese
MEAL_KIT.cheese_application: Pre-portioned cheese packs for DIY khachapuri kits, cheese subscription boxes

GEO_REST.rationale: Georgian restaurants use 200-600 lbs/mo for khachapuri, sulguni dishes, cheese platters. Higher end for multi-dish menus.

GEO_BAKERY.rationale: Bakeries producing 50-200 khachapuri/day use 400-1200 lbs/mo. Highest volume category. Shredded packs primary product.

GEO_MARKET.rationale: Retail sales of cheese wheels, shredded packs, nadughi, butter. Volume depends on store foot traffic and community size.

CAUC_REST.rationale: Caucasian restaurants with Georgian items on menu use less than pure Georgian places. 2-5 cheese dishes on menu.

RUS_REST.rationale: Russian restaurants may have 1-3 Georgian dishes. Khachapuri as a popular add-on item. Lower volume per location.

UZB_REST.rationale: Uzbek restaurants serve khachapuri as cross-cultural menu item. Limited but consistent cheese usage.

ARM_REST.rationale: Armenian cuisine uses similar fresh white cheeses. Potential for sulguni as string cheese alternative.

EE_MARKET.rationale: Eastern European groceries sell cheese to diaspora community. Volume depends on store size and Georgian community nearby.

CA_MARKET.rationale: Central Asian markets serve communities familiar with sulguni-type cheeses. Moderate retail volume.

DISTRIBUTOR.rationale: Distributors aggregate demand across 50-500 accounts. Single highest-volume deal type. Lower per-lb price but massive volume.

ARTISAN_PIZZA.rationale: Artisan pizzerias may use sulguni for 1-3 specialty pizzas. Small volume but premium pricing for unique product.

INTL_MARKET.rationale: International gourmet stores carry specialty cheeses at premium markup. Moderate volume, premium positioning.

CHEESE_SHOP.rationale: Artisan cheese shops buy small quantities at highest prices. Story-driven sales. Premium channel.

MEDITERRANEAN_REST.rationale: Mediterranean restaurants could use sulguni as halloumi alternative. Requires sales pitch education.

BRUNCH_UPSCALE.rationale: Upscale brunch spots may feature cheese boats or nadughi. Low volume but high-margin channel.

CATERING.rationale: Catering companies order event-driven. Inconsistent but potentially large per-order quantities.

MEAL_KIT.rationale: Meal kit companies buy in bulk at lower margins but huge volume if partnership secured.
